race.description: Evergreen Turf Sera Country Champs Qualifier
race.comment: Matt Dale has a strong hand in the contest with three leading prospects. ROSE AYE (15) couldn't have been more impressive when she gapped a Highway field over 1300m at Rosehill in fast time. Gets her chance to run the trip on the limit weight. Hard to stop. CANADIAN RULER (1) shouldered the 60.5kg with a tenacious on-pace win over 1400m at Randwick Kensington in BM72 class. Looks to take control early and will prove hard to get past. EVERIDO (4) consistent gelding who looks to have a good race in him this prep. Sprinted quickly first-up with a sound nose victory over 1100m at Canterbury in BM72 class. Ready for this trip and further now and a repeat effort can see him measure up again. MARTINI MUMMA (17) game on-pace mare set to peak third-up. Worth noting she's yet to win past 1100m but gets her chance on the limit weight from the soft draw. XCESSIVE FORCE (16) has claims if she can get across from the sticky draw.
